summary: Sen. Johnson writes to HHS Secretary Kennedy detailing findings that federal health officials in late 2022 identified, then ignored and downplayed, a risk of ischemic stroke in seniors who received the Pfizer bivalent booster, and raising concerns about masking in EB data mining.
body: Sen. Johnson sends a letter to Secretary of HHS Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. detailing findings that in late 2022, federal health officials identified, and subsequently ignored and downplayed, a risk of ischemic stroke in individuals age 65 years and older who received the Pfizer COVID-19 bivalent booster and raising concerns about masking in EB data mining used to monitor COVID-19 vaccine safety.[^fn-293]
